races._comment: Races organized by realm. starting_skills is a dict {skill_id: level}. starting_spells is an array of {school or schools, level, count}. elemental_affinity_bonuses is innate racial affinity independent of skills. reincarnation_weight is relative probability of being reborn as this race (higher = more common).

red_devil.name: Red Devil
red_devil.description: Hot-headed and driven by anger and lust, red devils are the finest warriors in the Hells.
todo: better_starting_weapon: start with a tier-2 melee weapon instead of tier-1

blue_devil.name: Blue Devil
blue_devil.description: Cold and calculating, blue devils keep grudges long after they were forgotten in the realms above.

yellow_devil.name: Yellow Devil
yellow_devil.description: Greedy and proud, yellow devils tend to cluster wherever wealth changes hands.

green_devil.name: Green Devil
green_devil.description: Quick-witted and paranoid, green devils make for excellent operatives and terrible friends.

black_devil.name: Black Devil
black_devil.description: Spawned from the Outer Dark, black devils live off confusion and fear.

white_devil.name: White Devil
white_devil.description: Lazy and a bit ditzy, white devils make pleasant company as far as hell's denizens go.

rolang.name: Rolang
rolang.description: The newly dead of the hungry ghost realm. Rolangs have been in the world of the dead for a relatively short time and are the least conscious of its inhabitants. Young walking dead are dim and animalistic — rigid, slow, moving in a jerky jiangshi-like manner — and only over long ages do some begin to develop awareness of their condition. Most rot away into skeletons. A rare few are preserved by alchemical and yogic arts and become the lords of their kind.

preserved.name: Preserved
preserved.description: Alchemical oils, mantras, and mineral compounds have halted your decay while others rotted to bone. The lords of their kind among the Rolang — rare, aware, and dangerous. You remember considerably more than most of your kind, and have had long years of stillness to put that memory to use.

skeleton.name: Skeleton
skeleton.description: Freed from the needs of the flesh by unstoppable decay, skeletons have had time to think. Most maintain the dryness of their sprawling catacombs and praise the blessings of abundant calcium with cheerful enthusiasm. Conscious skeletons are far more common than among the newly dead — the long wait in the grave strips away the animal confusion and leaves something clear-eyed and surprisingly sociable behind.

dralha.name: Dralha
dralha.description: Warrior-kings who refused to relinquish their power at death and rebuilt their dominion from beyond the grave. Dralha are former chieftains, generals, and conquerors who linger in the charnel grounds surrounded by the spirits of those who served them in life. They lead through force and presence, wielding weapons with the same authority they carried in the living world.

gyelpo.name: Gyelpo
gyelpo.description: Powerful tantric practitioners and sorcerers who accumulated enough spiritual force in life to persist after death as kings of the spirit world. Where dralha rule through arms and loyalty, gyelpos rule through binding oaths, ritual contracts, and the weight of accumulated power. Shugden is the archetype: a sorcerer who refused to dissolve, who built a new throne from obligation and fear.

dre.name: Dré
dre.description: Ghosts in the oldest and most literal sense: consciousness that has shed its body but not its attachments, drifting through the charnel grounds like smoke through bone. Dré are the most dissolved of the preta, barely present in the physical world. They feel little of its violence but remain bound to it by the thread of whatever they could not let go.
todo: physical_damage_reduction: implement 50% physical damage immunity in combat system

vetala.name: Vetala
vetala.description: Highly intelligent and curious tricksters who inhabit the charnel grounds. Vetalas are ambivalent towards the living and arbitrary in their dealings — sometimes helpful, sometimes dangerous, always keeping their own counsel. They drain life force through magic rather than physical violence, produce vivid illusions, and have a natural propensity for the arcane arts. Their propensity for rhetoric, humor, and meditation means they can usually talk their way out of a fight, though they rarely feel obliged to.

naga.name: Naga
naga.description: Serpentine beings of wisdom and power dwelling beneath the waves

human.name: Human
human.description: Beings of potential and choice, balanced in all aspects

shaza.name: Shaza
shaza.description: The predators of the underworld, the shaza aggressively seek out bodies to devour.

yidag.name: Yidag
yidag.description: Bellies distended with insatiable hunger, throats constricted to a hair's width — these beings are the most unfortunate embodiment of the karma that created their world.

skeleton_silver.name: Silver Skeleton
skeleton_silver.description: Not many withstand the trials of the underworld without losing their compassion. Those who have managed that feat remain as healers and helpers, looking with hope for the future to the worlds far above.

skeleton_copper.name: Copper Skeleton
skeleton_copper.description: Skeletons born of molten copper mirrors in the court of the Skeleton King of the Setting Sun find themselves especially attuned to the arts of power and magnetism.

skeleton_golden.name: Golden Skeleton
skeleton_golden.description: Gleaming in the flickering light of the crypt cities, golden skeletons are respected nobles among their people.

skeleton_iron.name: Iron Skeleton
skeleton_iron.description: Born of broken weapons on endless battlefields of the multiverse, iron skeletons are hard and unyielding, the most serious and driven of their kin.

skeleton_turquoise.name: Turquoise Skeleton
skeleton_turquoise.description: Prancing cheerfully in their rainbow skirts and flowery headdresses, turquoise skeletons serve as jesters, dancers and, often enough, grand viziers to the Great Bone Kings.

backgrounds._comment: Background definitions with starting skills and small attribute tweaks. starting_skills is a dict {skill_id: level}. attribute_modifiers are small flavour adjustments on top of race modifiers. available_races is a whitelist of race IDs (omit or empty = universal). weight is relative reincarnation probability.

wanderer.name: Wanderer
wanderer.description: A traveler who has seen many places and learned to read people and terrain alike.

scholar.name: Scholar
scholar.description: A student of ancient texts and wisdom, more at home with scrolls than swords.

merchant.name: Merchant
merchant.description: A trader of goods and services, sharp-tongued and sharper-eyed for opportunity.

monk.name: Monk
monk.description: A practitioner of spiritual disciplines, attuned to inner forces most ignore.

noble.name: Noble
noble.description: Born to privilege and power, accustomed to commanding others.

reveler.name: Reveler
reveler.description: A social creature of feasts, festivals, and flattery. Charm opens more doors than keys.

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.description: Trained in the arts of combat, body hardened by years of drill and battle.

farmer.name: Farmer
farmer.description: A worker of the land, with tireless endurance and practical knowledge.

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.description: A warrior who fights with uncontrolled fury, trading precision for annihilating force.

guard.name: Guard
guard.description: A protector of places and people, trained to hold ground and outlast attackers.

raider.name: Raider
raider.description: One who takes what they want by force, quick to strike and quicker to vanish.

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.description: A tracker and killer of prey, patient and precise at range.

executioner.name: Executioner
executioner.description: One who delivers final judgment. Efficient, dispassionate, feared.

torturer.name: Torturer
torturer.description: A professional in the application of suffering. Methodical, knowledgeable about bodies and their limits, and utterly without sentiment.

soul_jailer.name: Soul Jailer
soul_jailer.description: A warden of the condemned, guarding souls sentenced to suffer. Brutal and disciplined in equal measure.

infernal_scribe.name: Infernal Scribe
infernal_scribe.description: A keeper of sins and karmic ledgers. In hell, bureaucracy is its own form of torment — and these figures wield it like a weapon.

penitent.name: Penitent
penitent.description: A suffering soul who turned their torment inward and found something unexpected: clarity. Frail at first, but possessed of a spiritual awareness that others in hell have entirely forgotten.

spy.name: Spy
spy.description: An operative who trades in information, deception, and precisely timed violence. Trusted by no one, useful to everyone.

shambler.name: Shambler
shambler.description: Barely conscious, driven by hunger. What remains of a person after death strips everything else away.
todo: needs_upside: shambler is strictly penalizing (-7 net) — add a compensating passive ability eventually, e.g. immunity to fear/mind effects or reduced XP cost on unarmed/might

former_soldier.name: Former Soldier
former_soldier.description: Death did not end their service. Muscle memory survives the grave.

plague_victim.name: Plague Victim
plague_victim.description: Carries the sickness that killed them. Even in death, the rot spreads.

diplomat.name: Diplomat
diplomat.description: A speaker between peoples, trained to find common ground in the most hostile of rooms.

guardian.name: Guardian
guardian.description: A protector of sacred places, combining martial readiness with spiritual discipline.

priest.name: Priest
priest.description: A servant of the divine, trained in ceremony and in the healing and harmful uses of sacred power.

preserved.name: Preserved
preserved.description: Alchemical arts halted your decay. Oils, mantras and mineral compounds have kept you intact while others rotted to bone. You remember considerably more than most of your kind.

bog_warden.name: Bog Warden
bog_warden.description: Long years of standing knee-deep in the same patch of swamp have made you territorial and surprisingly canny about it. You know every root and current. Others stumble; you do not.

catacomb_keeper.name: Catacomb Keeper
catacomb_keeper.description: You tend the dry places. You know where every bone is, who it belonged to, and how long they have been here. The catacombs are yours and you maintain them with cheer and precision.

bone_dancer.name: Bone Dancer
bone_dancer.description: You rattle with purpose where others grimace. A drum, a flourish, a joke at the right moment — you discovered that morale is its own kind of magic, and yours is inexhaustible.

charnel_yogi.name: Charnel Yogi
charnel_yogi.description: You meditate where death is most concentrated. The proximity to dissolution, to rot and impermanence, has sharpened your understanding of the mind and weakened your attachment to the body.

trickster.name: Trickster
trickster.description: You live for the moment the illusion lands. Misdirection, impossible vanishings, arguments that fold in on themselves — you treat confusion as both art form and survival strategy.
